lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੨੮॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh bhagatee laavahu sach naanak amrit pee jeeo |4|28|35|
lines.english: Shower Your Mercy upon me, God; let me be committed to devotional worship. Nanak drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar of Truth. ||4||28||35||
the rain is falling everywhere.
The Lord of the Universe, the Support of the earth, has become Merciful;

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਸਦਾ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ਠਾਢਿ ਪਾਈ ਕਰਤਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: deen deaal sadaa kirapaalaa tthaadt paaee karataare jeeo |1|
lines.english: He is Merciful to the meek, always Kind and Gentle; the Creator has brought cooling relief. ||1||
He cherishes all His beings and creatures,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਦੇਤ ਸਗਲ ਆਹਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dukh bhanjan sukh saagar suaamee det sagal aahaare jeeo |2|
lines.english: The Destroyer of pain, the Ocean of Peace, the Lord and Master gives sustenance to all. ||2||
as the mother cares for her children.
The Merciful Lord is totally pervading and permeating the water and the land.
I am forever devoted, a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈ ਜਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rain dinas tis sadaa dhiaaee ji khin meh sagal udhaare jeeo |3|
lines.english: Night and day, I always meditate on Him; in an instant, He saves all. ||3||
God Himself protects all;
He drives out all sorrow and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੨੯॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: naam japat man tan hareeaaval prabh naanak nadar nihaare jeeo |4|29|36|
lines.english: Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind and body are rejuvenated. O Nanak, God has bestowed His Glance of Grace. ||4||29||36||
those barren places become mansions of gold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਪੀਐ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੋਇਦਾ ਸੇਈ ਨਗਰ ਉਜਾੜੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jithai naam na japeeai mere goeidaa seee nagar ujaarree jeeo |1|
lines.english: Where the Naam, the Name of my Lord of the Universe is not chanted-those towns are like the barren wilderness. ||1||
Where the Naam, the Name of God the Beloved is chanted
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
sees the Blessed Lord inwardly and outwardly.
One who meditates as he eats dry bread,

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਇ ਖਾਇ ਕਰੇ ਬਦਫੈਲੀ ਜਾਣੁ ਵਿਸੂ ਕੀ ਵਾੜੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khaae khaae kare badafailee jaan visoo kee vaarree jeeo |2|
lines.english: Know this well, that one who eats and eats while practicing evil, is like a field of poisonous plants. ||2||
One who does not feel love for the Saints,
misbehaves in the company of the wicked shaaktas, the faithless cynics;

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਲਭ ਦੇਹ ਖੋਈ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਜੜ ਅਪੁਣੀ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾੜੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dulabh deh khoee agiaanee jarr apunee aap upaarree jeeo |3|
lines.english: he wastes this human body, so difficult to obtain. In his ignorance, he tears up his own roots. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਰਮ ਅਸਾੜੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੦॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa naanak gun gaavai raakhahu saram asaarree jeeo |4|30|37|
lines.english: Shower Your Mercy upon Nanak, that he may sing Your Glorious Praises; please, preserve my honor. ||4||30||37||
I seek Your Sanctuary, O my Lord, Merciful to the meek,
Ocean of Peace, my Guru, Sustainer of the world.
All my troubles and sufferings have run away.
I cherish in my heart the Feet of my Lord and Master.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੀ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saant sookh sehaj dhun upajee saadhoo sang nivaasaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: The music of intuitive peace, poise and tranquility wells up within; I dwell in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||
The bonds of love with the Lord are never broken.
The Lord is totally permeating and pervading inside and out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਕਾਟੀ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: simar simar simar gun gaavaa kaattee jam kee faasaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating, meditating in remembrance on Him, singing His Glorious Praises, the noose of death is cut away. ||2||
The Ambrosial Nectar, the Unstruck Melody of Gurbani rains down continually;
deep within my mind and body, peace and tranquility have come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਇ ਰਹੇ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਦਿਲਾਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tripat aghaae rahe jan tere satigur keea dilaasaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: Your humble servants remain satisfied and fulfilled, and the True Guru blesses them with encouragement and comfort. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਾ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa saa tis te fal paaeaa |
lines.english: We are His, and from Him, we receive our rewards.
Showering His Mercy upon us, God has united us with Him.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
The rain has fallen; I have found the Transcendent Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣ ਰਹੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੧॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan rahe vaddabhaagee naanak pooran aasaa jeeo |4|31|38|
lines.english: Our comings and goings have ended, and through great good fortune, O Nanak, our hopes are fulfilled. ||4||31||38||
All beings and creatures dwell in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਇਆ ਕਲੇਸੁ ਭਇਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: geaa kales bheaa sukh saachaa har har naam samaalee jeeo |1|
lines.english: Suffering has been dispelled, and true happiness has dawned, as we meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||
The Supreme Lord God has become our Protector.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਈ ਘਾਲੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sunee benantee tthaakur merai pooran hoee ghaalee jeeo |2|
lines.english: My Lord and Master has heard my prayer; my efforts have been rewarded. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਸੇ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jis ke se tin hee pratipaare |
lines.english: The One, to whom we belong, cherishes and nurtures us.
